name: Old Man

dialogs.script:
say: Thank you again, {player}.
say: You're a true friend.

say: You found her?!
say: CICI!
say: Oh, my dear girl, I was so worried!
say: Thank you so much, {player}!
say: I promised you something for finding her...
say: Here — take these!
stopfollow
giveitem: potion 5
giveitem: pokeball 5
setflag: quest1_complete
clearflag: quest1_found_cici
clearflag: quest1_cici_arrived
lines: Oh, my dear girl, I was so worried!
I promised you something for finding her...

dialogs.script:
say: Please hurry, {player}!
say: Find my daughter on Route 1!
say: She's wearing a red dress.

say: Please...
say: I'll even give you Pokeballs if you find her!
setflag: quest1_refused_oldman
choice: Will you find my daughter?
clearflag: quest1_refused_oldman
setflag: quest1_find_daughter
say: Oh thank you! Please hurry north to Route 1!
lines: I'll even give you Pokeballs if you find her!
Oh thank you! Please hurry north to Route 1!

dialogs.script:
say: Oh, {player}!
say: Have you seen my daughter?
say: She went north to Route 1 and hasn't returned!
setflag: quest1_refused_oldman
choice: Will you find her?
clearflag: quest1_refused_oldman
setflag: quest1_find_daughter
say: Oh thank you! Please hurry north to Route 1!
